caption:
Let’s make Stuffed French Toast with @rainbowmilk! 😋

This is an easy and delicious breakfast dish! 
* Get four slices of bread. Remove the edges.
* Make a creamy filling using Rainbow Cream and mashed strawberries. Spread on each slice. 
* Whisk up a mixture of Rainbow Sweetened Condensed Milk, eggs, vanilla extract, pinch of cinnamon powder and salt.
* Dip the sandwich into the egg mixture and pan fry all sides until golden brown.
* Serve with fresh berries! 

So yum! 🥰

What do you think of my breakfast? Let me know what dish you’ll make with Rainbow Milk in the comment section. 🤗
